409 M1C M1C_STAGE_3_ULCER (M1C) Stage 3 Ulcers CHAR 1 Skin condition: ulcers - stage 3 in last 7 days. This field indicates the number of stage 3 ulcers on the resdient's body. Stage 3 is defined as a full thickness loss of skin layers exposing the subcutaneous tissues. Presents as a deep crater with or without undermining adjacent tissue.
410 M1D M1D_STAGE_4_ULCER (M1D) Stage 4 Ulcers CHAR 1 Skin condition: ulcers - stage 4 in last 7 days.
